texto: Hutch called into the semidarkness of The Shed. 'Somebody's coming, Heck!'Then he, with the rest, faded from sight with that uncanny quickness known only to creatures of the wild and young children who are, after all, also creatures of the wild.("The Shed")
explicacao: Citação de E. Everett Evans sobre temas ligados a familia. “Hutch called into the semidarkness of The Shed. 'Somebody's coming, Heck!'Then he, with the rest,…” articula familia, boys, children em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e children.
